author: gb9t
content:
**ALL 19 PHASE B OPEN QUESTIONS RESOLVED 2026-05-09 (user direction: 'accept all 19').**

Per-doc resolutions (each OPEN block converted to a Resolved Decision section in its source doc):

**crypto/** D1: v0 Layer-4 verification scope locked to chacha20, poly1305, blake2s, libsha256, hmac(sha256), aes-128/256, ecdsa P-256, curve25519. Other ~70 algos get Layer-1/2/3 only.

**drivers/** D1: drivers/staging/ out of scope v0 (CONFIG=n). D2: GPU/DRM FFI in v0; full Rust port deferred to v1+.

**fs/** D1: 3-bucket split — full Rust for ext4+btrfs+xfs+tmpfs+pseudo-FS-suite (proc/sysfs/devpts/debugfs/tracefs/configfs/kernfs/hugetlbfs/efivarfs/pstore)+overlayfs+fuse+9p+iso9660+squashfs+vfat; FFI for nfs+nfsd+cifs+f2fs+exfat+ntfs3+ecryptfs+autofs+ceph+jbd2; CONFIG=n for ~30 niche/dead. D2: jbd2 stays C in v0. D3: nfsd FFI in v0. D4: tmpfs huge-pages in v0.

**io_uring/** D1: BPF integration (bpf-ops + bpf_filter) in v0.

**kernel/** D1: sched_ext in v0. D2: BPF verifier RE-IMPLEMENTED in Rust (highest-leverage Layer-4 target — Verus soundness theorem). D3: liveupdate out of scope v0. D4: audit in v0. D5: Full ftrace in v0.

**net/** D1: 3-bucket split — full Rust for net/{core,socket,unix,packet,netlink,ipv4,ipv6,netfilter,sched,xfrm,bridge,8021q,ethernet+ethtool,devlink,tls,mptcp,sctp,bpf+xdp,sunrpc,handshake}; FFI for wireless+mac80211+bluetooth+9p+vsock+dsa+switchdev; CONFIG=n for ~33 niche/dead. D2: Wireless FFI in v0. D3: Bluetooth FFI in v0.

**security/** D4 (extending the existing D1-D3): Per-LSM port set — full Rust for yama+loadpin+landlock+lockdown+safesetid+keys+capabilities; FFI for SELinux+AppArmor+SMACK+TOMOYO+IPE+integrity-IMA-EVM; CONFIG=n for device_cgroup-as-LSM. D5: Author 00-security-principles.md NOW (issue #2 unblocked; preconditions all met).

**sound/** D1: Rust port deferred indefinitely (sound/ stays FFI'd C; v1+ may revisit only on CVE wave).

All 16 Tier-2 docs now show OPEN=0. 8 knowledge pages refreshed (crypto, drivers, fs, io_uring, kernel, net, security, sound).

The 'accept all' decision locks in Rookery v0's full Rust kernel surface:

ROUGHLY-PORTED-IN-RUST surface for v0 (the actual reverse-engineering work):
- arch/x86 (boot/entry/paging/kernel-platform/cpu-mitigations/...)
- lib/ (data structures + strings + math + usercopy + KUnit + vdso-core)
- mm/ entire subtree (page_alloc + slab + virtual-memory + reclaim + swap + zsmalloc + thp + hugetlb + migration + ksm + userfaultfd + memcg + numa + memory-hotplug + memory-failure + vmalloc + bootmem + percpu + hmm + sanitizers + damon)
- kernel/ entire subtree (sched-family incl. sched_ext + locking + time + task-lifecycle + futex + irq + workqueue + cgroup + BPF-incl-verifier + perf-events + ftrace-full + module + printk + power-mgmt + entry-helpers + dma + livepatch + KGDB + unwind + coverage + audit + crash-kexec + panic-reboot + sysctl + kallsyms + runtime-codepatching + accounting)
- fs/ VFS-core + pseudo-FS-suite + ext4/btrfs/xfs/tmpfs/overlayfs/fuse/9p/iso9660/squashfs/vfat + iomap + netfs + crypto + verity + fsnotify + quota + buffer-cache + direct-io+dax + pipe-splice + event-fds + aio + charset
- block/ entire subtree
- net/ core+ipv4+ipv6+netfilter+sched+xfrm+bridge+vlan+ethtool+devlink+tls+mptcp+sctp+bpf+xdp+sunrpc+handshake
- ipc/ entire subtree (small)
- init/ entire subtree (small)
- io_uring/ entire subtree
- crypto/ entire API + critical-path-Layer-4-verified algos
- security/ LSM framework + yama/loadpin/landlock/lockdown/safesetid/keys/capabilities + GR-RBAC (NEW Rookery-original stackable LSM)
- virt/ KVM core + virt/lib (with arch/x86/kvm)
- drivers/ Driver model + per-bus + v0 port-set (virtio-blk/net/console + e1000e + ahci + ehci/xhci + ps2-keyboard + hid-input + vt-console)

FFI'd-C surface for v0 (kept as upstream C with FFI shim during transition):
- jbd2 (under ext4)
- nfs client + nfsd + cifs/smb + f2fs + exfat + ntfs3 + ecryptfs + autofs + ceph (fs)
- wireless (cfg80211+mac80211) + bluetooth + 9p (transport) + vsock + dsa+switchdev (net)
- SELinux + AppArmor + SMACK + TOMOYO + IPE + IMA+EVM (security)
- Most drivers outside the v0 port-set
- All of sound/

CONFIG=n by default (not in v0 at all):
- ~30 fs/ niche/dead filesystems
- ~33 net/ niche/dead protocols
- drivers/staging/
- liveupdate
- math-emu, UML, 32-bit-only kernel
- device_cgroup-as-LSM (legacy v1)

Open issues:
#1 — master design tracking (this issue, stays open)
#2 — 00-security-principles.md (UNBLOCKED — preconditions met; ready to author)
#3 — Rookery clippy lints (high; HARD prereq for any subsystem implementation)
#4 — missing rust-for-linux abstractions (medium)
#5 — GR-RBAC + gradm reimplementation (high)

Phase B FULLY closed. Phase C (component-level Tier-3 designs, ~225 docs) is the next stage.
